text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: I'm observing a concert for ideas,<n>when...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Phew... I really hope I can pull this<n>off...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
There's no need to worry, Flower!<n>You're going
to do great!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
You got first place today, after all! You<n>even
managed to beat me, the class<n>representative!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
So you should have confidence in<n>yourself! You
won against me! ME!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Um, thanks. I'm just worried my<n>performance
won't be able to get<n>across to my fans how
much I<n>appreciate them...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Flower, listen. All you need to do is...<n>BAKUSHIN!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Together, now! You know the magic<n>word!
Leeet's...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: BAKUSHIIIIN!
RIP!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: ...Uh, what was that tearing sound<n>just now?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Huh? What? Who?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Oh no, Bakushin O! Your skirt's<n>tearing a bit in
the back!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: WHAT?! Where? WHERE?!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Ah, please stop moving! You're going<n>to make it
worse!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Hmmm, could it be the fabric couldn't<n>handle my
explosive Bakushin<n>energy?!

text_block_list.name: Equipe
text_block_list.text:
Nishino Flower, Sakura Bakushin O.<n>You're on in
five!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Yikes! What to do? What to do?! I cannot go out there in anything butperfect condition!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: I'll fix it!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Huh? Really?!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
With my speed, I can go grab my<n>sewing tools
and be back just in time!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
And then, if I just sew really quickly,<n>we might
be able to make it!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: What?! We can?! There's still hope?!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Please, calm down. Remember?<n>What's
important right now is...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Confidence!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: ...Done! Your skirt is as good as new!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Phew... And just in time.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: What steady stitching! Oh, thank you,<n>Flower!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Accurate, excellent, and above all,<n>speedy! That
kind of reliability could<n>make you a perfect class
rep!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, I should be thanking you.<n>Fixing your skirt
has really calmed me<n>down.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
What you said about confidence<n>really helped me
remember how<n>important it is.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Now I'm sure I'll be able to express<n>my
gratitude to my fans!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
But since this was a rush job, the<n>stitching might
be a bit fragile...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
So make sure not to do move around<n>too much or
too wildly—

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
My thanks to you, Flower! The class<n>
representative is BACK, BABY!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: To the stage we go! LET'S<n>BAKUSHIIIIIN!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Hey, wait up!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: I haven't taken the sewing pins out<n>yet!
